name: CamSplash
aboutCopy: CamSplash is a family-run pressure washing and softwash business serving our local community. We take pride in every job — from driveways to decks — and we don't leave until it's spotless.
serviceArea: Serving the greater local area and surrounding communities.
whyUs: Family-run — we treat your property like our own
Satisfaction guaranteed or we come back
